items.question: Do you offer same-day service?
items.answer: Yes, same-day appointments are available for most plumbing emergencies. Call us in the morning and we will do our best to get to you that day.

items.question: How much does a water heater replacement cost?
items.answer: Tank water heater installs typically run between $1,200 and $2,000 depending on the unit and your setup. We provide a written quote before starting any work.

items.question: Are you licensed and insured?
items.answer: Yes. Sunrise Plumbing holds a New Mexico plumbing license (NM-PL-54321) and carries full liability insurance on every job.
